nodes.label: Mirror Effect (X Coordinate Inversion)
nodes.rationale: X_espejo = 1.0 - X_original. MediaPipe's left shoulder (landmark 11) maps to avatar's right arm on screen, creating natural mirror behavior.

nodes.label: Torso 3D Rotation Simulation (Depth Attenuation + Clamping)
nodes.rationale: Uses MediaPipe Z coordinate difference between shoulders, attenuated by sensitivity factor and clamped to max ±25° Y rotation. CSS: perspective(600px) rotateY(anguloY) rotateZ(anguloX). Prevents avatar from turning its back.

nodes.label: Arm Kinematics (Atan2 Angle Calculation)
nodes.rationale: Uses Math.Atan2 on MediaPipe coordinates to compute shoulder-to-elbow and elbow-to-wrist angles. Arm segments have fixed pixel lengths; only rotation changes. Local elbow angle = global_angle - shoulder_angle.

nodes.label: Rest Position and Arm Rigidity Rule
nodes.rationale: Arms have fixed pixel size, NEVER scale. When wrist visibility falls below threshold, arms gradually return to 0° (hanging vertically against torso). Coordinates only drive rotation, never stretch.
